title: Particle Physics
shortSummary: Quarks, leptons, bosons, the Standard Model, and the fundamental building blocks of matter — the physics explored at CERN.
whyItMatters: Particle physics answers the deepest question: what is everything made of? The Standard Model is the most precisely tested theory in science. Understanding it reveals the fundamental forces and particles that compose the universe.
coreConcepts: The Higgs boson and mass generation
